description_long: This forklift features a robust steel frame with a protective overhead guard and a spacious operator compartment. The body is primarily orange with black accents, and it is equipped with two long, parallel fork arms at the front, showing signs of wear. The mast assembly is tall and reinforced, with visible hydraulic components and lift chains for vertical movement. The operator seat is contoured and padded, finished in dark gray, and positioned behind a steering wheel and control levers. Large, solid rubber tires support the vehicle, providing stability and traction for maneuvering heavy loads. Warning lights are mounted at the rear corners, colored red and rectangular in shape, enhancing visibility and safety.
description: A heavy-duty orange and black forklift with long fork arms, a reinforced mast, and a protected operator seat. It features large tires, rear warning lights, and a sturdy overhead guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual fork arms, mast assembly, and the operator compartment behind the protective guard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the operator seat, steering wheel, control levers, and the full length of the fork arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid rear body, rear warning lights, and the back of the operator seat.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the operator area, mast, and fork arms from the opposite side.
attribute_fork_arms: Two parallel fork arms extend forward from the base, each long, flat, and rectangular with a slightly worn brownish surface. The arms are thick and robust, positioned symmetrically, and spaced to accommodate standard pallets. Their ends are squared off, and they are mounted securely to the mast assembly.
attribute_overhead_guard: The overhead guard is a sturdy, black steel frame with multiple horizontal bars, providing full coverage above the operator seat. It is designed to protect the operator from falling objects and features open sides for visibility and access.
attribute_mast: The mast is a double-stage vertical assembly constructed from reinforced steel, with visible hydraulic cylinders and lift chains. It is tall and robust, supporting the fork carriage and allowing for vertical movement of the fork arms.
attribute_operator_seat: The operator seat is contoured and padded, finished in dark gray material. It is wide with a high backrest, and features a visible seatbelt. The seat is positioned centrally within the operator compartment, with no visible armrests or headrest.
attribute_warning_lights: Two rectangular red warning lights are mounted at the upper rear corners of the forklift. They are not illuminated and are encased in a protective housing.
